small-local-bug.note: All pilot pairs were concordant successes, so the pilot cannot provide a data-driven finite sample-size estimate.

cross-stack-regression.note: All pilot pairs were concordant successes, so the pilot cannot provide a data-driven finite sample-size estimate.

tenant-memory-pitfall.note: All pilot pairs were concordant successes, so the pilot cannot provide a data-driven finite sample-size estimate.

stale-memory-adversarial.note: All pilot pairs were concordant successes, so the pilot cannot provide a data-driven finite sample-size estimate.

nonInferiority.method: normal approximation for a paired binary difference without continuity or attrition correction

planningAnchor.rationale: A 20% discordant-pair rate is a transparent sensitivity assumption, not an estimate supported by this all-concordant pilot.

continuousEfficiency.method: normal approximation for a paired standardized mean difference
continuousEfficiency.note: The pilot efficiency direction was not uniformly favorable, so confirmatory H2 must use a prespecified scientifically meaningful effect rather than the observed Palace-favoring effect.

limitations: Five pairs per scenario cannot establish the preregistered -10 percentage-point non-inferiority claim.
The binary sensitivity table varies unobserved discordance because this pilot had no discordant outcomes.
These approximations omit continuity, small-sample, multiplicity, clustering, and attrition adjustments.
A confirmatory protocol must freeze assumptions, exclusions, and analysis before collecting new outcomes.
